photos.caption: Office interior — desk wall, ultrawide monitor, bookshelf, French doors to deck
Office interior — bed corner, guitar and flag wall, high windows
Raised deck (future east room) — recliner sectional, sliding door, portable AC
Raised deck close-up — sectional, guitar case, fishing net, AC exhaust
Steps up to raised deck, north side — cabinet, microwave, staged tools
Future kitchen footprint (ground level) — workbench, miter saw, propane, fridge staged at wall
Samsung fridge and bins staged at future kitchen; Apodaca Villa sign
West walkway — cement mixer, work table with drills, outdoor shower enclosure behind
East side — vinyl fence panels staged, brick pile, sand, pomegranate tree
Pavilion arches from east path — wheelbarrow, hand truck, ladders, brick stacks
View from under pavilion — work zone, pizza oven, red barn shed beyond
Pavilion with covered hot tub, arches; RV at left, building behind
Pavilion and brick pizza oven from garden, succulents in foreground
East yard mid-clear: brick path exposed, wheelbarrow and hand trucks out, materials staged on east deck
South yard by gate cleared to dirt and gravel; hand truck and salvaged lumber staged
Patios cleared: office steps and brick path exposed, fridge and work carts staged under canopy
Yard at gate looking north: cleared ground, brick walkway intact, furniture staged on east deck
East side along new vinyl fence cleared; salvaged brick stacked beyond the arches
North patio (future kitchen) cleared to gravel; appliances and tool carts staged under canopy, fireplace dome exposed
Temp work station along office wall: fridge, microwave, miter saw and tool chest staged; ground cleared
SE yard along vinyl fence cleared to dirt; steps and east deck edge visible
Deck steps and plinth exposed; ground scraped level with fresh sand spread — slab prep starting. Work station tidied under canopy
Kitchen footprint graded smooth under the roof — view from the north arch pillar toward the office; brick path partially reclaimed
North wall east arch bay: CMU knee wall infills below the arch with a hose bib on the kitchen side — the future sink counter location, water already stubbed. Covered spa on the porch beyond
Under the main roof looking west: deck steps and gate, kitchen floor graded, work station and canopy zone; fireplace arch at right
